---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for DarkTowerSync
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use Case

Describe the problem this feature solves or the scenario in which it would be used.
(e.g., "As a host player, I want to... so that I can...")

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like to see this implemented. Include API shape, UI changes, or protocol changes if relevant.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches you've considered and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or related issues.
